suite.name: docs-impact-benchmarks
suite.purpose: Small deterministic fixtures for checking docs-impact false positives, false negatives, coverage, waiver behavior, and source task-packet research handoffs.

cases.title: Tooling change without docs is reported
cases.rationale: A source script change should require matching operator or tooling documentation unless waived.

cases.title: Tooling change with matching docs is covered
cases.rationale: The docs contract should pass when a tooling change includes one of the configured tooling docs.

cases.title: Tests-only change does not require docs
cases.rationale: The tests ignore path prevents docs-impact noise for test-only maintenance.

cases.title: Prompt source change is not missed
cases.rationale: Canonical prompt changes are user-visible workflow changes and should stay in the prompt docs-impact category.

cases.title: Explicit no-docs-needed reason waives a tooling miss
cases.no_docs_needed: Internal cleanup only; no operator-facing behavior changes.
cases.rationale: Waivers should make an otherwise missing docs-impact result pass while still exposing the missing category.

cases.title: Source task packet without research summary is reported
cases.rationale: New source task packets are research backlog state and should not pass docs-impact without a matching summary, backlog narrative, or explicit waiver.

cases.title: Source task packet with research summary is covered
cases.rationale: The research summary is the durable handoff surface for new task-packet state, current backlog status, and closeout notes.

cases.title: Source task packet can be explicitly waived
cases.no_docs_needed: Packet is archival evidence only; no backlog state or research summary changed.
cases.rationale: A packet-only archival note can pass only with an explicit no-docs-needed reason that remains visible in docs-impact output.
